COMPETITIVE BENCHMARK: A/B TEST ACTION PLAN
Real screenshots vs. Al Rugaib — what we must test immediately to close the conversion gap
A/B TEST 1 Hero Messaging: Discount-Led vs. Lifestyle-Led
⚠ Al Rugaib — CURRENT
Full-page 75% discount banner + Flash Sale — commodity positioning
✓ Home Centre — BENCHMARK
Lifestyle photography with emotional copy — premium brand framing
Test Hypothesis
A/B test Variant A (current discount-first) vs. Variant B (lifestyle hero with promotion secondary). Measure: add-to-cart rate, time on site, AOV.
Expected: +8–12% AOV if lifestyle wins
A/B TEST 2 Checkout: Apple Pay on PDP vs. Cart-Only
⚠ Al Rugaib — CURRENT
No Apple Pay on PDP — customer must navigate to cart to pay
✓ Arhaus — BENCHMARK
Buy Now / Add to Cart on same screen — one-tap mobile checkout
Test Hypothesis
Add Apple Pay button directly on PDP above the fold. Variant A: current cart flow. Variant B: Apple Pay + Buy Now on PDP. Measure: mobile CVR, checkout abandonment.
Expected: +15% mobile CVR (primary target)
A/B TEST 3 Delivery Copy: Vague Range vs. Dynamic Exact Date
⚠ Al Rugaib — CURRENT
"Delivery from 7 to 14 days" — vague window creates anxiety and cart abandonment
✓ Wayfair — BENCHMARK
Exact delivery date shown on product card — "Get it by Thursday, June 19"
Test Hypothesis
Pull D365 stock data to show dynamic delivery date per SKU on PDP. Variant A: "7–14 days". Variant B: "Estimated delivery: [exact date]". Measure: CVR, WISMO call volume.
Expected: −20% WISMO calls + CVR lift
A/B TEST 4 BNPL: Hidden in Cart vs. Prominent on PDP
⚠ Al Rugaib — CURRENT
Tamara/Tabby not visible on product card or PDP fold — customer unaware until cart
✓ Abyat — BENCHMARK
BNPL installment shown on product card — "تقسيط" visible before customer clicks
Test Hypothesis
Show Tamara/Tabby monthly installment amount directly on PDP under the price (e.g. "or 4 × 1,250 SAR with Tabby"). Variant B adds BNPL grid to PDP fold. Measure: high-ticket AOV, cart-to-checkout rate.
Expected: +20% high-ticket (3K+ SAR) conversion
A/B TEST 5 PDP Photography: SKU-First vs. Room-in-Context
⚠ Al Rugaib — CURRENT
Multiple SALE tags, product on white background only — functional but not aspirational
✓ RH — BENCHMARK
Full-room lifestyle shot as hero — sells the home vision, not just the SKU
Test Hypothesis
For top 20 best-seller SKUs: Variant A (current white-bg only). Variant B (room lifestyle as first PDP image, white-bg secondary). Measure: engagement rate, add-to-cart rate, return rate.
Expected: −15% return rate, +10% add-to-cart
A/B TEST 6 Urgency: Standard Delivery vs. 7-Day Fast Option
⚠ Al Rugaib — CURRENT
No fast delivery option visible — single delivery window, no urgency lever
✓ Wayfair — BENCHMARK
"Get it fast" filter + delivery date prominently surfaced on every card
Test Hypothesis
Surface 7-day express option as a premium choice on PDP checkout area. Variant A: standard only. Variant B: standard + "Express 7-Day Delivery" toggle with price delta. Measure: checkout rate, AOV delta, cash conversion cycle.
Expected: Accelerated revenue recognition + CVR lift
All tests to be tracked via GA4 + Hotjar · Priority order: Test 2 → Test 4 → Test 3 → Test 1 → Test 6 → Test 5 · Owner: E-Commerce Manager + Creoshift Agency
